title: ToolCard
description: Compact discovery manifest for a tool/API; keep serialized size under 2048 bytes.

id.description: Slug identifier in the form publisher/tool (lowercase, hyphenated).

name.description: Display name surfaced to agents when shortlisting the tool.

verified.description: True if the registry completed a limited publisher-identity/manual metadata review. Not a guarantee of safety, legality, security, accuracy, suitability, or endorsement.

description.description: ≤256 character summary agents read during shortlist.

pricing.description: Short text or URL describing pricing details.

currency.description: ISO 4217 or crypto ticker for the primary price reference.

payment.description: Payment requirement flags surfaced on the ToolCard.

is_paid.description: True if the agent must pay before invoking the tool.

purl_supported.description: Whether the tool can be used with Stripe purl for payment flows.
